user_task_description: This deck was assembled from mismatched slides and needs a consistent visual theme.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Apply a unified blue professional theme across the whole presentation.
atomic_scope: Only global theme transfer is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with a coherent blue theme.

inspired_by.title: Why do so many presentations still have inconsistent colors and layouts? Are people not using Slide Master?
Good all-round PowerPoint theme for lectures?

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Some spacing is awkward
- Slide layouts are basic
- Content wording could be improved, but that is not the explicit request
